prompt:
A beginner-friendly microcontroller board shown in a clean product-style close-up on an electronics bench, with its USB port, header pins, power jack, and neatly soldered components clearly visible. Nearby jumper wires, a small breadboard, and a blinking test LED suggest introductory prototyping and experimentation. The board should be recognizable as a generic hobby microcontroller platform without any brand markings.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future maker-lab aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic PCB textures, crisp metal contacts, no logos, no readable silkscreen text, and no faces. The composition should be uncluttered and centered on the board so it works cleanly as a DSPACE electronics inventory icon.
